testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Given category not found in the searchbox expected [test] but found [Given category not found in the searchbox]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Given category not found in the searchbox expected [test] but found [Given category not found in the searchbox] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at stepDefinitions.HeaderSectionStepDef.user_search_for_the_product_category(HeaderSectionStepDef.java:44) at ✽.User search for the product category "test"(file:///C:/Users/iamar/eclipse-workspace/AutomationTestStore/src/test/java/features/OrderHistory.feature:13)
